intro_text: You have volunteered for a research study about shopping and purchases. You will have a short online interview with a researcher. The researcher will ask you some questions.

1.title: Statement & Reason
1.instruction: Say your answer and one reason.

4.title: Full Answer
4.instruction: Use the short cues to speak the full answer.

1.area1:
Statement: I would say ____ .
Reason: 
because it can ____.
1.area2:
Relationship / Interaction
Efficiency (via interaction, data collection, skills) 
Stress/ Health
1.area3:
I would say exercising with others is better 
because it can help people build new relationships.

2.area2:
Relationship / Interaction
Efficiency (via interaction, data collection, skills) 
Stress/ Health
2.area3:
For example, in the past, I usually exercised alone.
To be more specific, I went to the gym alone every day.
It could be quite boring sometimes, and I didn't make new friends.

3.area2:
Relationship / Interaction
Efficiency (via interaction, data collection, skills) 
Stress/ Health
3.area3:
However, since last year, I have started working out with other people at the gym. 
We trained together, we exchanged fitness tips with one another, and we sometimes hung out together after each workout session.
Gradually, we became close, and some of them are my best friends now.

4.area1:
I would say ____ because it can ___
For example: before → [x statement ] →[x reason] 
However, After→ [statement] →[reason]
4.area2:
Relationship / Interaction
Efficiency (via interaction, data collection, skills) 
Stress/ Health
4.area3:
I would say exercising with others is better because when people exercise with others, they can build new relationships.
For example, in the past, I usually exercised alone.
To be more specific, I went to the gym alone every day.
It could be quite boring sometimes, and I didn't make new friends.
However, since last year, I have started working out with other people at the gym. 
We trained together, we exchanged fitness tips with one another, and we sometimes hung out together after each workout session.
Gradually, we became close, and some of them are my best friends now.

1.area1:
I would say ____ 
because it can ____
1.area2:
Relationship / Interaction
Efficiency (via interaction, data collection, skills) 
Stress/ Health
1.area3:
Statement: I would say AI will be more popular in the future 
Reason: because it can help people learn more efficiently.

2.area2:
Relationship / Interaction
Efficiency (via interaction, data collection, skills) 
Stress/ Health
2.area3:
For example, in the past, people didn't use AI much.
When they wanted to learn new skills, it wasn't easy. 
They had to ask others, and it was not efficient.

3.area2:
Relationship / Interaction
Efficiency (via interaction, data collection, skills) 
Stress/ Health
3.area3:
However, since [AI] was invented, everything has changed.
Now, if people want to learn something, they can simply ask ChatGPT and get the information instantly. AI can even write tools for them.
As a result, people can [work more efficiently] now.
It’s already very [popular], and I imagine it will only become more [popular in the future.]

4.area1:
I would say ____ because when ___, ______ can ____ .
For example: before → [x statement ] →[x reason]. 
However, After→ [statement] →[reason] →[highlighted ending]
4.area2:
Relationship / Interaction
Efficiency (via interaction, data collection, skills) 
Stress/ Health
4.area3:
I would say AI will be more popular in the future because when people use AI, they can learn more efficiently
For example, in the past, people didn't use AI much.
When they wanted to learn new skills, it wasn't easy. 
They had to ask others, and it was not efficient.
However, since [AI] was invented, everything has changed.
Now, if people want to learn something, they can simply ask ChatGPT and get the information instantly. AI can even write tools for them.
As a result, people can [work more efficiently] now.
It’s already very [popular], and I imagine it will only become more [popular in the future.]

questions.q: When you buy something you use regularly, do you prefer to shop online or visit a store? Why?

I see.
Is it better to choose a lower-priced product or pay more for one that may last longer? Why?

highlight_phrases: necessary to read customer reviews before buying an unfamiliar product
questions.q:
Interesting. Next, I'd like to get your opinion.
Is it necessary to read customer reviews before buying an unfamiliar product? Why or why not?

highlight_phrases: sales and discounts essential for saving money while shopping
questions.q:
Good points. I just have one more question.
Are sales and discounts essential for saving money while shopping, or can planning and comparing options help people save just as effectively? Explain.
